title: The people behind the papers - Tiffany Roach and Kari Lenhart.
abstract: Germ stem cells in Drosophila reside within a specialized stem cell niche, but the effects of stress on these stem cell populations have been elusive. In a new study, Roach and Lenhart show that repeated mating stress induces reversible changes in the germ stem cell niche. To know more about their work, we spoke to first author, Tiffany Roach, and corresponding author, Kari Lenhart, Principal Investigator at Drexel University in Philadelphia, USA.
